spec_trace.roadmap_pointer: Handshake_Master_Spec_v02.144.md 7.6.3 (Phase 1) -> [ADD v02.144] Second-pass feature-family coverage / coverage sweep

draft_scope.intent:
- What: Backfill Charts & Dashboards as explicit runtime outputs with chart specs, source-table lineage, and operator evidence.
- Why: Charts are a high-ROI combination surface for docs, decks, DCC, and analytics, but current appendix coverage is still missing.
draft_scope.scope_sketch:
- IN_SCOPE:
  - ChartSpec-driven runtime coverage.
  - Source-table / trace lineage and export posture.
- OUT_OF_SCOPE:
  - Full charting feature build-out.
  - Advanced BI/dashboard implementation.
draft_scope.acceptance_criteria:
- Charts feature row exists with explicit runtime mapping.
- Chart source lineage is preserved in appendix/runtime guidance.
draft_scope.risks_unknowns: - Risk: charts are treated as static presentation garnish instead of governed derived artifacts.

assumptions_to_attack: A stub is planning metadata, not execution authority.
Stub Markdown may contain stale draft scope until activated through a signed packet.
Apps must not treat stub contracts as runnable work packets.
minimum_controls: Require official packet contract before Coder or Validator launch.
Fail drift checks when stub Markdown changes without contract regeneration.
